data.content: Planning complete. Implementation should add a new `loom update` command in the CLI, backed by explicit host-to-artifact mapping for the three published release targets only, and use GitHub release redirect URLs for `latest` instead of the Releases API. Include installer parity work in `install.sh`, add focused tests for check/force/no-op/unsupported-platform behavior with injectable network stubs, and update README/getting-started plus docs/releasing so the new user-facing install/update behavior ships with docs.
